Target Scope (CN): 己方单排/最弱/最强/全体单位
Description (CN): 提升指定友军单位的战力点数数值。
Description (EN): Increase the power of targeted ally unit(s) or row.

Target Scope (CN): 敌方最强/最弱/全体/随机单体
Description (CN): 降低指定敌方单位的战力点数数值。
Description (EN): Decrease the power of targeted enemy unit(s) or random enemies.

Target Scope (CN): 敌方最强/点数大于20的行最强
Description (CN): 消灭指定的单位，直接降低其战力为0并送入墓地（如白起消灭最强敌军，火烧连营消灭高点数排最强）。
Description (EN): Destroy targeted unit(s) (reducing power to 0 or sending directly to graveyard).

Description (CN): 自动在指定的战场排上召唤出指定数量的额外衍生卡牌（如楚国小兵、秦国战士），增强场面点数优势。
Description (EN): Spawn a specific token card (e.g. chu-token, qin-token) onto a row.

Description (CN): 从牌库抽一张牌，并选择手牌中的一张牌弃置入墓地，起到优化手牌构筑的作用。
Description (EN): Draw 1 card from deck and discard 1 card to the graveyard.

Description (CN): 从己方墓地中选择并重新打出一张非金色单位牌回到战场，激活其技能。
Description (EN): Play a unit card from the graveyard back onto the battlefield.

Description (CN): 锁住目标单位，使其拥有的技能和战力调整效果失效，无法再次触发动作技能。
Description (EN): Lock a targeted unit, disabling its active passives and skills.

Description (CN): 当满足特定战场条件（如我方点数落后、对手已Pass放弃跟牌）时，自身获得额外的点数强化奖励。
Description (EN): Increase own power if a specific condition is met (e.g. when behind in score, or when opponent has passed).
